JUDGE: DAVID A. GARCIA. CLERK: JOSIE C. ROQUE. REPORTER: JOSEPH VICKSTEIN. JURY TRIAL CONTINUED FROM AUG-23-02. WITNESSES SWORN AND EXAMINED. DEPOSITION TESTIMONY WAS READ. EXHIBIT MARKED FOR IDENTIFICATION. JURY TRIAL SET FOR AUG-26-2002 CONTINUED TO AUG-27-2002 AT 8:30 AM. JURY WAS ADMONISHED.(501)

JURY TRIAL CONT'D FROM AUG-26-02. JUDGE: DAVID A. GARCIA. CLERK: JOSIE C. ROQUE. REPORTER: JOSEPH VICKSTEIN. WITNESSES SWORN AND EXAMINED. EXHIBITS INRODUCED FOR IDENTIFICATION. THE PLAINTIFF RESTS. DEFENDANTS' CASE PROCEEDED. JURY TRIAL SET FOR AUG-27-2002 CONTINUED TO AUG-28-2002 AT 8:30 AM IN 501. JURY ADMONISHED. OUT OF THE PRESENCE OF THE JURY, DEFENDANTS INTERPOSED A MOTION FOR COMPLETE AND/OR PARTIAL DIRECTED VERDICT. MOTION DENIED IN PART, THE TWO REMAINING MATTERS TO BE BRIEFED BY THE PLAINTIFF. COURT ADJOURNED.(501)

TRIAL BY JURY CONTINUED FORM AUG-27-02. JUDGE: DAVID A. GARCIA. CLERK: JOSIE C. ROQUE. REPORTER: JOSEPH VICKSTEIN. WITNESSES EXAMINED. EXHIBITS MARKED FOR IDENTIFICATION AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE. OUT OF THE PRESENCE OF THE JURY, HEARING ON DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR COMPLETE AND/OR PARTIAL DIRECTED VERDICT. DEFENSE RESTED. PLAINTIFF'S REBUTTAL ARGUMENT. BOTH SIDES RESTED. COURT INSTRUCTED THE JURY. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL PRESENTED HIS CLOSING ARGUMENT. JURY TRIAL SET FOR AUG-28-2002 CONTINUED TO AUG-29-2002 AT 8:30 AM. COURT ADMONISHED THE JURY.(501)
